tracks.rawText: 3:17Do You Hear Me Girl [2195652179]v5.5CoverTrap and dubstep hybrid featuring aggressive electronic production, The track centers on a heavy, distorted sub-bass that follows a syncopated trap rhythm, A sharp, metallic snare hits on the third beat of each bar, complemented by rapid-fire 32nd-note hi-hat rolls, A high-pitched, dissonant synth lead plays a repetitive two-note motif with a glissando effect, The arrangement includes cinematic percussion hits, orchestral brass stabs, and a prominent vocal sample with a pitch-shifted, distorted quality, A recurring 'It's a trap' vocal drop signals transitions, The tempo is 140 BPM in the key of F minor, The structure features a build-up with rising pitch risers and a heavy drop characterized by a growling bass synth and aggressive percussionPublishRemix
tracks.title: Do You Hear Me Girl [2195652179]

tracks.rawText: 2:05Do You Hear Me Girl [2195652179]UploadIndie pop with funk and disco influences, Clean electric guitar plays a rhythmic, palm-muted sixteenth-note pattern, A second electric guitar enters with a bright, chorused tone playing syncopated staccato chords, The bass guitar performs a melodic, walking line with frequent slides and octave jumps, Drums feature a tight, dry snare and a steady eighth-note hi-hat pattern, Male vocals are delivered in a mid-range tenor with occasional shifts into a breathy falsetto, The arrangement includes a prominent instrumental break featuring a wah-wah filtered guitar solo and a syncopated cowbell, 115 BPM, E Major, 4/4 time4PublishRemix
tracks.title: Do You Hear Me Girl [2195652179]

tracks.rawText: 4:07NOVRA – Stay ｜ Emotional Deep House [um5aQIxiMh4]UploadModern alternative rock with electronic pop production, The track features a driving four-on-the-floor kick drum, a syncopated synth bass, and layered electric guitars including clean arpeggios and distorted power chords, Male vocals are processed with heavy reverb and occasional pitch correction, shifting between a breathy chest voice and a soaring head voice, Atmospheric synth pads and rhythmic vocal chops provide a dense background texture, The tempo is 128 BPM in the key of B minor, The arrangement builds from a sparse, synth-driven verse into a wall-of-sound chorus with thick guitar layers and crashing cymbals4PublishRemix
tracks.title: NOVRA – Stay ｜ Emotional Deep House [um5aQIxiMh4]

tracks.rawText: 5:36PI*^UploadAlternative rock with trip-hop influences, Features a prominent, distorted electric bass line playing a syncopated riff, Drums consist of a sampled breakbeat with a crisp snare and a heavy, compressed kick, A clean electric guitar plays sparse, melodic fragments with long delay tails, Atmospheric synth pads provide a sustained harmonic layer, Male vocals are delivered in a breathy, intimate style with significant reverb and a slight slapback delay, The arrangement alternates between a stripped-back groove and a more layered, driving section with crashing cymbals, Key of G minor, 92 BPM4PublishRemix
tracks.title: PI*^
